name: Phase status summary
description: Phase 1 (backend hardening): COMPLETE. Phase 2 (frontend rebuild): COMPLETE. Phase 3 (media depth): partial — image overlay, audio/video reply, Whisper done; service worker + WCAG audit remaining. Phase 4 (UIConfig wiring + exhibit): COMPLETE. Phase 5 (polish + federation): future.

name: Phase 5 scope
description: Deferred: service worker + offline queue, WCAG AA full audit, archive picker remaining filters (tags/date/author/transcript), exhibit block drag reorder, icon+voice profile rendering, show_waveform renderer, exhibit publish endpoint, ActivityPub federation, DID identity, i18n Paraglide runtime.

name: UI shadow walk open flags
description: 32 remaining flags from full shadow walk (2026-02-24). Breakdown: 7 SILENT FAIL, 5 RACE, 6 NO FEEDBACK, 9 ASSUMPTION, 4 DEAD END, 5 NAV TRAP, 2 HIDDEN REQ. Most are Phase 5 scope (pagination, unsaved-changes guards, race conditions on rapid navigation).

name: Hybrid loop process
description: ORIENT: Read STATE.md (metrics) + mulch prime (domain knowledge). BUILD: Implement. TEST: Write/update tests. RECTIFY: Lint, type-check, fix. SYNC: Overwrite STATE.md metrics + mulch learn/record for new knowledge. Exit: zero gaps, clean types, green tests. Do not commit — user commits manually.
